parameters.query:
select 
  fl.id as location_id,
  fl.user_id,
  fl.label,
  ST_X(fl.location::geometry) as lon,
  ST_Y(fl.location::geometry) as lat,
  fl.pm25_threshold,
  fl.aqi_threshold,
  fl.enable_app_push,
  fl.enable_telegram_push,
  u.telegram_chat_id
from favorite_locations fl
join users u on u.id = fl.user_id
where fl.enable_app_push = true
   or fl.enable_telegram_push = true;

with latest as (
  select distinct on (station_name) *
  from real_time_stations
  order by station_name, updated_at desc
)
select station_name, last_aqi, last_pm25, last_pm10, wind_speed_kmh, wind_degrees,
       station_wind_speed_ms, humidity, temperature, dominant_pollutant,
       forecast_pm25_tomorrow, forecast_pm25_day2,
       ST_X(location::geometry) as lon, ST_Y(location::geometry) as lat,
       ST_Distance(location, ST_MakePoint($1, $2)::geography) / 1000 as distance_km
from latest
order by location <-> ST_MakePoint($1, $2)::geography
limit 1;
select onesignal_player_id from device_push_tokens where user_id = $1;

parameters.text:
=⚠️ Haze alert for {{$('Evaluate Threshold Breach').item.json.label}}: AQI {{$('Evaluate Threshold Breach').item.json.last_aqi}} and PM2.5 {{ $json.last_pm25 }} near {{$('Evaluate Threshold Breach').item.json.station_name}}. 

This exceeds your alert threshold of AQI Threshold: {{ $json.aqi_threshold }} and PM2.5 Threshold: {{ $json.pm25_threshold }}.

You can edit or disable this alert in the AirIntel Malaysia App.
